prompt: Make the go/no-go call. Weigh the schedule pressure explicitly and state the conditions under which the lift could proceed.
scenario: A vessel lift calculates to 92 percent of chart capacity at the working radius. Site wind is averaging 18 mph with gusts to 28 mph against a manufacturer wind limit of 20 mph for this boom configuration. The schedule shows the crane demobilizes tomorrow and the next window costs a week of standby.
title: T1 S-302 Marginal crane pick in gusts (judgment)
